label: Quick Access landing — brand-stamped + breathing room
items: The mobile Quick Access screen now starts well below the floating menu button so nothing crowds the top of the page.
Your greeting, eyebrow pill, and subtitle now live inside a green-tinted hero card with a soft border — breaks up the white expanse and grounds the screen in the brand.
The Rhozly logo + wordmark now sit at the top of that hero card as a small, restrained brand stamp.

label: Behind the scenes
items: Hero card uses a gradient of the three existing theme tokens — primary-container green, white, and tertiary peach — strictly within the design system.
Top padding accounts for device safe-area-inset-top so notched and dynamic-island phones still look right.
